title: Mr. 4 Swings the Bat
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on mr. 4 swings the bat, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Mr. 4 Swings the Bat. Usopp and Chopper face Mr. 4 and Miss Merry Christmas, turning fear and teamwork into a real battle. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Government of the University of

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey! Wasn't there a person over there just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A person!? Are you outta your mind!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: More import- family, watch out for the cannons! They've begun shooting at us!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: The rebels can't see us with all this smoke!

dialogue.speaker: Lassoo
dialogue.text: Why would you do such a stupid thing...?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: You fool! I haven't given the order to shoot yet!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: You are not to act without orders!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: F-Forgive me, sir! My hand just slipped...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't be afraid of a little smoke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fight for our country! Do not forgive the King!

summary: This part develops mr. 4 swings the bat and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
